title: ACTREC Recruitment 2026 - Walk-In-Interview for Academics Coordinator Posts
description: The Advanced Centre for Treatment, Research and Education in Cancer (ACTREC) has announced the official notification for 2026. To fill up the various vacancies for the Academic Coordinator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the BAMS, BUMS, BHMS, and BDS can grab this chance and apply for the ACTREC Recruitment 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, ...
